name: Atombit
blog_profile: Atombit operates as a PE-backed experience intelligence group combining data science (Profusion), analytics (Amplify Analytix), and CX consulting under one umbrella. Their methodology emphasizes data-driven customer intelligence with GenAI overlays for predictive analytics and personalization. Delivery is primarily project-based consulting with managed analytics services. Core thought leadership themes center on financial services customer intelligence, retail personalization, and AI-augmented experience measurement. Their non-participation in the Qualtrics ecosystem positions them as platform-agnostic, competing on analytics depth rather than technology partnerships.

name: Sovanta
blog_profile: Sovanta's methodology centers on making enterprise experience data actionable within SAP environments through embedded analytics and AI-powered dashboards. Their delivery model combines Qualtrics XM implementation with custom SAP UI/UX development, creating a unique niche at the intersection of operational and experience data. Thought leadership focuses on closing the gap between experience insights and business process execution. Their AI approach emphasizes practical, embedded intelligence rather than standalone AI products, with strong emphasis on user adoption and design-thinking for enterprise dashboards. DACH-rooted but increasingly positioning for broader EU enterprise SAP customers.

name: New Metrics
blog_profile: New Metrics specializes in CX maturity assessment and Voice of Customer program design for government and semi-government entities across the GCC. Their methodology emphasizes national CX frameworks, citizen experience measurement, and organizational CX capability building. Delivery is consulting-led with Qualtrics as the underlying technology platform. Thought leadership consistently addresses public sector digital transformation, Arabic-language CX measurement, and benchmarking against international CX maturity standards. Their regional dominance in Saudi Arabia and UAE government CX creates a defensible niche.

name: Ipsos CX
blog_profile: Ipsos CX combines global market research scale with CX advisory, leveraging proprietary loyalty frameworks, advanced analytics, and cross-industry benchmarking. Their methodology is research-first, emphasizing statistically rigorous measurement, segmentation, and predictive modeling of customer behavior. AI approach centers on augmenting traditional research methods with machine learning for text analytics, predictive NPS, and automated insight generation. Delivery spans managed services, strategic advisory, and technology implementation primarily around Medallia. Thought leadership themes include experience ROI quantification, loyalty economics, and sector-specific CX benchmarks.

name: commonFont
blog_profile: commonFont is a Qualtrics-native consulting firm focused on enterprise XM program design, implementation, and optimization. Their methodology emphasizes end-to-end Qualtrics deployment including survey design, dashboard creation, integration architecture, and program governance. Strong banking and financial services vertical expertise with case studies around customer journey measurement, branch experience optimization, and digital CX analytics. AI approach is Qualtrics-ecosystem aligned, leveraging Qualtrics AI capabilities rather than building proprietary AI tools. Thought leadership centers on Qualtrics best practices, XM program maturity, and industry-specific implementation patterns. Their Platinum Partner status and X4 presence make them a benchmark for Qualtrics ecosystem engagement.

name: Higher Oak
blog_profile: Higher Oak positions as a UK/EU Qualtrics Platinum Partner specializing in XM program design and implementation for mid-market and enterprise clients. Their methodology emphasizes practical, ROI-driven Qualtrics deployments with focus on employee experience and customer feedback programs. Blog content historically covers Qualtrics platform tips, XM best practices, and UK-specific regulatory considerations. Their relatively quiet digital presence and absence from X4 2026 activity may indicate a more relationship-driven sales model or potential strategic repositioning.

name: Lukkap
blog_profile: Lukkap is a Spanish-origin CX and EX consultancy operating across Iberia and Latin America with a methodology rooted in customer journey mapping, experience-driven organizational transformation, and leadership development. Their delivery model is pure consulting without strong technology platform alignment, differentiating them from Qualtrics-ecosystem players. Thought leadership addresses the human side of experience management including cultural change, leadership coaching, and employee-customer experience linkage. AI is not a prominent theme in their content, with emphasis instead on qualitative research, design thinking, and organizational psychology. Their multi-country LATAM footprint provides geographic reach but without technology platform leverage.

name: Izo
blog_profile: Izo positions as the leading CX consultancy across the Spanish-speaking world with Qualtrics certification and delivery capabilities spanning 15+ countries in Latin America and Iberia. Their methodology combines Voice of Customer program design, CX strategy consulting, and journey mapping with Qualtrics platform implementation. Thought leadership covers CX governance, digital experience optimization, NPS program design, and sector-specific CX frameworks. Their AI approach follows Qualtrics ecosystem capabilities with some proprietary analytics overlays for Spanish-language text analytics. Commercial leadership under Bea Pedregal anchors growth messaging with strong emphasis on large enterprise and financial services clients across the region.

name: Globant
blog_profile: Globant operates as a global digital-native technology company with CX capabilities housed within its Connected Experiences Studio alongside 20+ other specialized studios. Their methodology is engineering-first, emphasizing custom technology development, AI integration, and large-scale digital platform implementation rather than traditional CX consulting or survey-based measurement. AI approach is enterprise-grade with dedicated AI and data studios that complement CX work. Delivery model is primarily staff augmentation and managed development teams for large transformation programs. Thought leadership is diffused across the broader Globant brand rather than concentrated in CX-specific content, which can make their CX positioning less visible but their execution capacity remains significant for large enterprise deals.

name: GemSeek
blog_profile: GemSeek fue absorbida por Accenture Song. Su propuesta original era analytics de CX con foco en predicción de churn y modelado de lealtad — un enfoque data science-first dentro del espacio CX. Sin actividad independiente desde la adquisición.

name: Vocé Group
blog_profile: No digital footprint available for analysis. Vocé Group remains untrackable through standard competitive intelligence methods. May operate as a private consulting practice, have been acquired/dissolved, or operate under a different name. Recommend direct human intelligence gathering if this competitor is considered strategically relevant.

name: Zill Consulting
blog_profile: No digital footprint available for analysis. Zill Consulting remains untrackable through standard competitive intelligence methods. May operate as a private or boutique consultancy with referral-based business development, have been acquired, or operate under a different entity name.

name: Act XM
blog_profile: No digital footprint available for analysis. Act XM remains untrackable through standard competitive intelligence methods. The name suggests potential Qualtrics XM ecosystem alignment but no verifiable evidence exists to confirm this positioning or assess their capabilities.

name: Acceleration Strategy
blog_profile: Acceleration Strategy is a Canada/US-based Qualtrics partner specializing in enterprise XM program strategy, implementation, and optimization. Their client portfolio includes notable brands like CrowdStrike, WestJet, and OLG, demonstrating cross-industry capabilities in technology, aviation, and gaming/entertainment. Their methodology appears to emphasize strategic XM program design with strong change management and adoption components. Without a dedicated blog or content hub, their thought leadership is primarily distributed through Qualtrics partnership channels, event presentations, and LinkedIn activity. Their X4 2026 presence positions them for amplified visibility during peak Qualtrics ecosystem engagement season.
